limitations: Nominal voltage is an importance proxy, not capacity, flow, impedance, or failure risk.
synthetic_peak_demand_mw is a calibrated scenario value, not observed local demand.
input.weight_definition: Each edge weight is the summed nominal voltage of confirmed circuits between its two substations.

objective.gamma_range_formula: gamma_l ~ Uniform(0, pi / max_abs_J), where max_abs_J = max_(i,j) |J_ij|; if max_abs_J = 0, gamma_l = 0
objective.name: weighted_max_cut

qaoa.selection_rule: maximum search expected_cut; ties use lowest candidate index
maximum search expected_cut; ties use lowest candidate index
maximum search expected_cut; ties use lowest candidate index

source_provenance.weight_definition: Each edge weight is the summed nominal voltage of confirmed circuits between its two substations.
